message:
🌱 Add podman-desktop: Podman Desktop fails to download components when behind mission (#1260)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-desktop-9826-podman-desktop-fails-to-download-components-when-behind-tran",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-desktop: Podman Desktop fails to download components when behind transparent network proxy (self signed cert error)",
+    "description": "Podman Desktop fails to download components when behind transparent network proxy (self signed cert error). This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-desktop troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-desktop deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-desktop configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant podman-desktop configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get configmap -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=podman-desktop\n```\n### Bug description\n\nMany corporate users will be beind a transparent proxy. This means https connections will get intercepted and the corporate cert will be inserted."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Podman Desktop fails to download components when behind…",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nUpdate the certificates loaded from the Windows store to include both root and intermediate CA certificates\n\n### Screenshot / video of UI\n\nN/A\n\n### What issues does this PR fix or reference?\n### How to test this PR?\n1. Unzip the zip file in a directory\n2. Run podman run -d --rm --name squid -v squid:/etc/squid -p 3128:3128 ubuntu/squid\n3. Add rootCA.crt to the Windows Root Certificates store and CA.crt to the Intermediate Certificate store\n4. Launch Podman Desktop and\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Podman Desktop fails to download components when… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n podman-desktop --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?\n\nUpdate the certificates loaded from the Windows store to include both root and intermediate CA certificates\n\n### Screenshot / video of UI\n\nN/A\n\n### What issues does this PR fix or reference?\n### How to test this PR?\n1. Unzip the zip file in a directory\n2. Run podman run -d --rm --name squid -v squid:/etc/squid -p 3128:3128 ubuntu/squid\n3.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
